prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
T-009 is approaching its next scheduled maintenance cycle. Review its recent fault history and any open work orders to determine whether anything requires priority escalation before the maintenance window begins.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should list recent fault records for T-009, summarize open work orders, and state whether any item requires escalation with a brief justification.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Retrieve the most recent DGA record for T-009.
  Step 2: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Classify the dissolved gas concentrations into a fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method. (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [wo] list_fault_records — List all historical fault records for T-009.
  Step 4: [wo] list_work_orders — List all open work orders for T-009.

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Retrieve the most recent DGA record for T-009.",
    "server": "fmsr",
    "tool": "get_dga_record",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-009"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-009\",\n  \"sample_date\": \"2024-01-15T00:00:00\",\n  \"dissolved_h2_ppm\": 12.49,\n  \"dissolved_ch4_ppm\": 7.31,\n  \"dissolved_c2h2_ppm\": 0.09,\n  \"dissolved_c2h4_ppm\": 1.76,\n  \"dissolved_c2h6_ppm\": 2.5,\n  \"dissolved_co_ppm\": 251.77,\n  \"dissolved_co2_ppm\": 1495.11,\n  \"fault_label\": \"Normal\",\n  \"source_dataset\": \"synthetic\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Classify the dissolved gas concentrations into a fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method.",
    "server": "fmsr",
    "tool": "analyze_dga",
    "tool_args": {
      "h2": 12.49,
      "ch4": 7.31,
      "c2h2": 0.09,
      "c2h4": 1.76,
      "c2h6": 2.5,
      "transformer_id": "T-009"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"iec_code\": \"N\",\n  \"diagnosis\": \"Normal / Inconclusive\",\n  \"r1_ch4_h2\": 0.5853,\n  \"r2_c2h2_c2h4\": 0.0511,\n  \"r3_c2h4_c2h6\": 0.704,\n  \"input_gases\": {\n    \"h2_ppm\": 12.49,\n    \"ch4_ppm\": 7.31,\n    \"c2h2_ppm\": 0.09,\n    \"c2h4_ppm\": 1.76,\n    \"c2h6_ppm\": 2.5\n  },\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-009\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "List all historical fault records for T-009.",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "list_fault_records",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-009",
      "fault_type": null,
      "maintenance_status": null,
      "limit": 1000
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-009\",\n  \"fault_id\": \"F007\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Overload Trip\",\n  \"location\": \"Substation Alpha\",\n  \"voltage_v\": 11000,\n  \"current_a\": 184,\n  \"power_load_mw\": 34.24,\n  \"temperature_c\": 29.0,\n  \"wind_speed_kmh\": 10.8,\n  \"weather_condition\": \"Rainy\",\n  \"maintenance_status\": \"Completed\",\n  \"component_health\": \"Normal\",\n  \"duration_hrs\": 0.8,\n  \"downtime_hrs\": 5\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "List all open work orders for T-009.",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "list_work_orders",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-009",
      "status": "open",
      "priority": "any"
    },
    "response": "",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
Based on the results, there are no critical issues that require priority escalation before the maintenance window begins for T-009. The recent DGA record indicates normal dissolved gas concentrations, and the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method confirms a normal/inconclusive diagnosis. Additionally, the historical fault record for F007 indicates that the issue was resolved and maintenance was completed. There are also no open work orders listed for T-009.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": true,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "Improve data retrieval accuracy by handling empty responses for list_work_orders tool."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Improve data retrieval accuracy by handling empty responses for list_work_orders tool.
